post_processing.summary: Method 6 processed export for later visualization

mapping_details.description: first half -> a, second half -> b, reverse bits inside each half

post_processing.derived_counts_interpretation: Counts are a visualization-oriented renormalization of Method 6 processed grid values to the original shot total using the largest remainder method.

processed_representation.grid_value_semantics: Nonnegative Method 6 residual amplitudes on the 64x64 (a,b) grid after smoothing, even-odd masking, capped weighting context, and row-centered residual processing.

notes: This file is post-processed and is not a raw backend output.
The original input JSON in data/ was not modified.
The exported counts are derived from Method 6 processed grid values for compatibility with visualization-style tooling.
